name: Arkas Sandbox
description: Arkas Sandbox is a sandbox game allowing players to create mods with the Lua programming language
author: MESYETI
fullDesc: Arkas Sandbox is a WIP sandbox game allowing players to create mods with the Lua programming language. It acts as an easy way to develop for the Arkas Engine.
This game will become available in the near future, soon after support for multiplayer in Arkas Engine is complete
